summary: Klio host preflight injects an authorized, versioned snapshot before every Codex turn. The isolated live workflow, stale-snapshot rejection, restart/resume, idempotent writes, and adversarial fixtures pass without requiring the model to initiate mandatory reads.
requiredNextArchitecture: Proceed with Codex app-server behind a Klio orchestrator that authorizes and injects bounded snapshots, schema-validates terminal outputs, and binds every write to family identity plus snapshot version.
